Sports Scene

Copied

A total of 18 golds are up for grabs on Thursday at the 2024 Paris Summer Olympics. The competitions in the following four events may be worth your attention.

The artistic gymnastics women's all-round final will take place at the Bercy Arena at 18:15 (GMT+2). Qiu Qiyuan and Ou Yushan of China will be among the competitors.

The fencing women's foil team final is scheduled to get underway at the Grand Palais at 19:10 (GMT+2).

And two exciting swimming finals will be held in the Olympic Aquatics Centre at the Paris La Defense Arena, first the women's 200-meter butterfly event at 20:30 (GMT+2), and later the women's 4횄혰200-meter freestyle relay at 22:03 (GMT+2).
